title: Surgeon Vacancy at Metropolis Healthcare - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Metropolis Healthcare - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Metropolis Healthcare in Vadodara offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Metropolis Healthcare:
Metropolis Healthcare is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Metropolis Healthcare!
